label: Transparent Broccoli Floret motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single broccoli floret crown with short pale green stem for a Morphous design-system motif, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: one fresh broccoli floret crown, clustered bead-like bud canopy, organic branching structure, compact rounded crown silhouette, subtle natural irregularity, pale broccoli-green cut stem, tiny branching stems visible under the crown, accurate vegetable anatomy, fully opaque edges. The motif should feel like a vegetable garden analytics system: clustered metrics, crown modules, pale stem structure, crisp garden freshness.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical food cutout, refined realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges, natural clean studio light that preserves broccoli green and stem detail.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; three-quarter view showing the crown cluster and short stem; do not crop the subject; no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: fresh, precise, organized, garden-operational; no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: broccoli crown greens, dark floret shadow greens, pale broccoli stem green, soft yellow-green highlights, near-white garden mist highlights only; do not use magenta anywhere in the subject.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: keep subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges; no text, no watermark, no basket, no plate, no soil, no garden bed, no second vegetable, no decorative background, no extra saturated colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Broccoli Floret motif as the source reference for color, texture, silhouette, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-compatible design-system board titled "Morphous Broccoli Floret".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: clustered analytics system for vegetable garden operations, harvest planning, crop health metrics, floret batch QA, irrigation readings, inventory review, and field-team task routing; dense, fresh, precise, modular, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible broccoli motif: dark crown green, floret bead green, garden moss shadow, tender stem green, pale broccoli stem, sprout highlight, soft garden mist white, pale chlorophyll surfaces, and deep canopy ink. Do not introduce unrelated blue, purple, coral, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: premium product design board with a left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and a bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small broccoli floret motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for garden analytics, harvest logs, inventory tables, and crop alerts. Include readable examples such as "ブロッコリー", "収穫", "圃場", "在庫", "健全率".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, crop health chart, harvest readiness card, irrigation signal card, inventory table, batch quality chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle clustered floret-dot texture, branching stem-line dividers, pale cut-stem panels, chlorophyll-tint surfaces, dew highlight chips, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, soft garden shadow, floret cluster border, stem-green focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no purple or blue gradients.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent Broccoli Floret motif and the visible Morphous Broccoli Floret light design-system board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation of the same shadcn/tweakcn-compatible system, titled "Morphous Broccoli Floret". It must feel like the same clustered analytics system in dark mode, not a new motif.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160 wide 16:9 board, high-resolution source asset, crisp readable UI labels, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: night-mode clustered analytics system for vegetable garden operations, harvest planning, crop health metrics, floret batch QA, irrigation readings, inventory review, and field-team task routing; dense, fresh, precise, modular, operational.
Color palette: derive only from the visible broccoli motif: deep canopy ink and crown-shadow backgrounds, dark moss panels, floret bead green primary controls, pale broccoli stem foreground text, sprout highlight chart accents, tender stem green borders, garden mist highlights. No unrelated blue, purple, coral, neon, or generic SaaS colors.
Layout: keep the same section coverage and product-board logic as the light board: left palette/token rail, top typography strip, central component and form examples, right navigation/dashboard/table/search modules, and bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and token samples. Include a small broccoli floret motif preview.
Typography: compact English UI type plus Japanese typography guidance for garden analytics, harvest logs, inventory tables, and crop alerts. Include readable examples such as "ブロッコリー", "収穫", "圃場", "在庫", "健全率".
Components: primary button, secondary button, icon buttons, input, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, crop health chart, harvest readiness card, irrigation signal card, inventory table, batch quality chart, loading state, empty state, error state, success state.
Texture/materials: subtle dark clustered floret-dot texture, branching stem-line dividers, pale stem highlight chips, chlorophyll-on-canopy surfaces, dew highlight chips, 8px-radius cards and controls, restrained dark shadows.
Implementation notes visible as tokens: radius 8px, spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32, canopy shadow, floret cluster border, stem-green focus ring.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels fit their containers; professional shadcn/tweakcn product design board; no marketing hero; no abstract gradients; no watermark; no random logos; no unrelated saturated colors; no pure black flat background; no purple or blue gradients.
